name: ORG Ontology (Organization Foundation)
description: Core organization ontology defining organizational entities, structures, and foundational concepts

versionHistory.changes: OAA v6.1.0 compliance. 2 entities (Organization, OrganizationContext), 5 relationships, 4 business rules.

Extended Organization type enum with StandardsBody, GovernmentAgency, InternationalOrg for domain authority modelling (CG-ONT dependency). BR-ORG-002 updated to restrict new types from isClientOf. Epic 30 F30.7 S30.7.1.

notes: Foundation ontology providing core organizational concepts used across all other ontologies. v3.1.0 adds domain authority organization types for governance ontology support.
